zh.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: 英國林可爾史爾貝勒奧 煙雨 可萊索普 安德 阿比 安德 格林菲爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles於1428年出生在英國林可爾史爾貝勒奧 煙雨 可萊索普 安德 阿比 安德 格林菲爾德時，他的父親Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby22歲，母親Joan de Waterton28歲。他於1448年1月18日與Joan Willoughby結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年3月12日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles于1428年出生在英国林可爾史爾貝勒奧 煙雨 可萊索普 安德 阿比 安德 格林菲爾德时，他的父亲Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby22岁，母亲Joan de Waterton28岁。他于1448年1月18日与Joan Willoughby结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年3月12日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles was born in 1428, in Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, was 22 and his mother, Joan de Waterton, was 28. He married Joan Willoughby on 18 January 1448. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 12 March 1470, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles est né en 1428, à Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan de Waterton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Willoughby le 18 janvier 1448. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1470, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles 1428 in Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby 22 und seine Mutter Joan de Waterton 28. Er hat am 18. Januar 1448 Joan Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1470 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles è nato il nel 1428 nel Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Waterton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Willoughby il 18 gennaio 1448. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1470, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Welles 7th Lord Wellesが1428年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアベレアウ ウィス クレイソルペ アンド アビー アンド グレエンフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsbyは22歳，母Joan de Watertonは28歳であった。1448年1月18日にJoan Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年3月12日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: 영국 링코실르 벨리 위스 클레이소 앤드 압이 앤드 그린필드
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles(이)가 1428년 영국 링코실르 벨리 위스 클레이소 앤드 압이 앤드 그린필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Waterton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1448년 1월 18일 Joan Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles nasceu em 1428, em Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Waterton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Willoughby em 18 de janeiro de 1448. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1470, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: белло вит клеитаурп анд аби анд гринфиелд, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Welles 7th Lord Welles родился в 1428 г. в местности белло вит клеитаурп анд аби анд гринфиелд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Waterton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Willoughby 18 января 1448 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 марта 1470 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan Willoughby el 18 de enero de 1448. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1470, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
